result.stdout:
Geren.Server.Exporter

Usage:
  geren-server-exporter --project <path.csproj> --output-dir <folder> [options]
  geren-server-exporter -p <path.csproj> -o <folder> [options]
  geren-server-exporter -project <path.csproj> -o <folder> [options]
  geren-server-exporter -s <settings.json> [options]
  geren-server-exporter --settings-path <settings.json> [options]

Notes:
  MapGroup prefixes are detected only for compile-time constant strings.
  Avoid MapGroup(Func<string>)/reflection-based wrappers for route prefixes.

Important:
  Add the types you want to exclude from the parameters to the settings.json file.)

Options:
  -f, --output-file <name>       Output file name (default: <ProjectName>.gerenapi.json)
  -c, --configuration <cfg>      MSBuild Configuration (default: Release)
      --platform <platform>      MSBuild Platform (default: AnyCPU)
  -h, --help                     Show help
